tasks.title: Request creation
tasks.description: Create request with title, description, service type, priority, photo upload

tasks.title: Full request workflow
tasks.description: Enhanced detail panel with timeline, notes, action buttons (approve/decline quote, accept, RFI response), quote & invoice display, newNoteCustomer flag handling
tasks.notes: Includes cp09 notes/comments. Action buttons for pending_quote_approval, awaiting_acceptance, rfi statuses

tasks.title: Notes/comments on requests
tasks.description: Timeline view of notes with add-note form, fetched from request_notes table
tasks.notes: Built into cp08. Public visibility only for now. Sent on Enter key or button click.

tasks.title: Refactor to use backend API
tasks.description: Created shared api/client.js module (q, create, update, del, customerFilter). All pages now call through client instead of raw Supabase URLs.
tasks.notes: client module matches admin pattern. Server proxy remains until full Backend API project is built.

projects.name: Backend API
projects.description: Python REST API layer replacing Firebase Cloud Functions. Customer/contractor/request/location/invoice CRUD, state machine, auth.

tasks.title: Server migration: FastAPI with proper REST
tasks.description: Replaced stdlib http.server with FastAPI + Uvicorn. Single shared module (fastapi_app.py) with admin/portal modes. Async Supabase proxy via httpx. Proper CORS middleware. Systemd services updated.
tasks.notes: server/fastapi_app.py. Both servers running on ports 3001 (admin) and 3002 (portal).

tasks.title: Auth: real session management
tasks.description: Server-side session store with 24h TTL. Token generated on login, validated on every /api/supabase/* request via require_session dependency. Logout endpoint clears session. Frontend sends Bearer token in Authorization header.
tasks.notes: Admin and portal client.js both send token. Static file routes exempt from auth. Session is in-memory dict (lost on server restart).

tasks.title: Move secrets to env vars
tasks.description: All secrets moved from source code to .env file + systemd Environment directives. _require_env() fails fast if any are missing. python-dotenv loads .env in development.
tasks.notes: server/.env (gitignored). Admin + portal systemd services have Environment= lines. DB password, Supabase URL, anon key all out of source code.

tasks.title: Remove/lock Supabase proxy
tasks.description: Proxy locked down: auth required (api02), table allowlist, rate limiting (100 req/min/IP). Anon key removed from frontend (api03).
tasks.notes: ALLOWED_TABLES set in fastapi_app.py. RATELIMIT_MAX/RATELIMIT_WINDOW configurable via env vars. Disallowed tables return 403.

tasks.title: Customer CRUD endpoints
tasks.description: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/customers, GET /api/customers/summary (replaces fetchCustomerSummaryData), GET /api/customers/{id} with location/request counts. Portal-scoped via session customer_id.
tasks.notes: Direct pg8000 queries on customers view + customerLocations and requests views. CamelCase columns quoted.

tasks.title: Contractor CRUD endpoints
tasks.description: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/contractors. Full contractor fields from contractors view.

tasks.title: Location CRUD + geocoding
tasks.description: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/locations. Portal-scoped via session customer_id. Geocoding not yet implemented (needs Google Maps API key).
tasks.notes: customerLocations view with camelCase columns. Geocoding to be added when Google Maps API key is configured.

tasks.title: Request CRUD with state machine
tasks.description: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/requests, POST /api/requests/{id}/transition with VALID_TRANSITIONS dict enforcing 11-status lifecycle. Portal-scoped.
tasks.notes: State transitions: pending_approval->rfi/awaiting_quote/cancelled, rfi->pending_approval/cancelled, awaiting_quote->pending_quote_approval/cancelled, pending_quote_approval->awaiting_acceptance/declined/rfi, awaiting_acceptance->accepted/declined, accepted->in_progress/cancelled, in_progress->contractor_completed/cancelled, contractor_completed->completed/cancelled

tasks.title: Notes/history endpoints
tasks.description: GET/POST /api/requests/{id}/notes, DELETE /api/notes/{id}. Full CRUD on request_notes table.

tasks.title: Invoice management
tasks.description: GET/POST /api/requests/{id}/invoice, POST /api/invoices/process-auto-approvals (48hr window). Full CRUD on request_invoices table.
tasks.notes: Auto-approval endpoint processes invoices where auto_approve_date has passed.

tasks.title: Image upload (presigned URLs)
tasks.description: POST /api/upload/presign returns upload + public URL. GET /api/upload/url/{bucket}/{path} returns public URL.
tasks.notes: Uses Supabase Storage API via httpx. Frontend uploads directly to the returned URL.

tasks.title: Asset CRUD endpoints
tasks.description: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/assets. Full asset fields from assets view.

tasks.title: Lead management endpoints
tasks.description: Lead CRUD + convert to customer

tasks.title: Activity/analytics endpoints
tasks.description: Dashboard summaries, monthly activity, fetchCustomerDetailData

tasks.title: User management endpoints
tasks.description: Create/update/delete customer users, password management

tasks.title: OTP generation/verification
tasks.description: One-time passcode flow for contractor and location registration

tasks.title: Proper CORS + logging
tasks.description: Add CORS headers, structured logging, request IDs

projects.name: Scheduled Tasks
projects.description: Background jobs replacing Firebase scheduled functions: auto-complete requests (12h), auto-reassign contractors (4h).

tasks.title: Auto-complete requests (12h cron)
tasks.description: APScheduler job (IntervalTrigger 12h). Finds contractor_completed requests with invoice submit_date >48h ago, marks as completed.
tasks.notes: Runs inside FastAPI admin server. Logged as simplyclik.scheduler.

tasks.title: Auto-reassign contractors (4h cron)
tasks.description: Escalate to next contractor if current hasn't accepted within priority timeout window (6-120h)
tasks.notes: Priority timeouts: None=120h, Low=36h, Medium=24h, High=12h, Urgent=6h

tasks.title: Choose scheduler (Celery/APScheduler/cron)
tasks.description: Evaluate and implement background task scheduler
